questions.q: Which Battlefield 4 map was confirmed to be returning in Battlefield 6 Season 3, according to a gameplay trailer released on May 6, 2026?
questions.correctText: The May 6 gameplay trailer revealed that Golmud Railway is returning as an expanded, reimagined map called 'Railway to Golmud'.

questions.q: Following years of being sidelined due to distribution constraints, which Eugen Systems World War II real-time strategy game was officially re-released on Steam on May 6, 2026?
questions.correctText: R.U.S.E. made its return to Steam on May 6, 2026, complete with all its original DLCs and full Steam Deck support.

questions.q: A Subnautica 2 developer vlog released on May 6, 2026, confirmed that the highly anticipated underwater survival sequel will launch in Early Access for what price?
questions.correctText: Unknown Worlds Entertainment announced in their May 6 Dev Vlog that Subnautica 2 will cost $29.99 at its Early Access launch.

questions.q: A 1.0 release trailer on May 6, 2026, highlighted 'Zagreus' Journey', an ambitious fan-mod that seamlessly integrates the entirety of the original Hades game into which title?
questions.correctText: The 'Zagreus' Journey' mod allows players to explore the original Hades regions and fight its legacy bosses seamlessly as Melinoë within Hades II.

questions.q: In a May 6, 2026 press release, ASUS announced their Computex 2026 booth will feature an experimental zone celebrating the 20th anniversary of which iconic hardware brand?
questions.correctText: ASUS is celebrating the 20-year milestone of Republic of Gamers (ROG), which was originally formed in 2006, at Computex 2026.
